use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in forms and landing pages
Destructive action triggers with confirmation states
Navigation links styled as buttons with hover effects
Icon-only buttons for compact UI toolbars
Composable button components via asChild pattern
ai_summary: A reusable Button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority for flexible variant and size options. Supports multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon), with built-in focus-visible keyboard navigation states and hover effects. Designed as a primitive atomic component suitable for composing into larger UI systems like sticky footers or card actions.
